file_insights.purpose: Core authentication module definition with lifecycle management
key_components: AuthModuleContext interface for hook execution context
Lifecycle methods: onLoad, onEnable, onDisable, onUnload
Hook system with registration, unregistration, and execution
Event listener setup for user and organization deletion

file_insights.purpose: Route configuration and path builders for auth endpoints
key_components: authRoutes configuration object with public and protected routes
Path builder functions: buildAuthApiPath, buildAuthAdminPath, buildFullPath
Helper functions to check if routes are public or protected

patterns_discovered.description: Core module pattern with clear separation between module definition, routes, and service layers
evidence: Static metadata and routes defined on class
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables auto-discovery and dynamic loading through ModuleLoader

patterns_discovered.description: Module implements standard lifecycle hooks (onLoad, onEnable, onDisable, onUnload)
evidence: onLoad registers services with DI container
patterns_discovered.benefit: Provides predictable, manageable module initialization and cleanup

patterns_discovered.description: Application-level hooks that can be registered by external code
evidence: AuthModuleHooks interface with before/after hooks for auth events
registerHook and unregisterHook methods for dynamic hook management
executeHook with error handling for safe execution
patterns_discovered.benefit: Allows plugins/extensions to respond to auth lifecycle events

patterns_discovered.description: Routes explicitly categorized as public or protected with helper functions
evidence: Clear documentation of which endpoints require authentication
patterns_discovered.benefit: Simplifies middleware configuration and security checks

patterns_discovered.description: Module metadata defined as static class properties
evidence: static id, name, version, isCore properties
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables introspection and reflection without instantiation

patterns_discovered.description: Extensive JSDoc comments with examples and type definitions
patterns_discovered.benefit: High maintainability and ease of understanding for developers

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Core Module Cannot Be Fully Disabled
gotchas_discovered.description: AuthModule.isCore = true prevents full disable, but onDisable still exists
gotchas_discovered.workaround: onDisable is called only during shutdown; doesn't fully deactivate the module during runtime

gotchas_discovered.description: Errors in hook execution are caught and logged but don't propagate
gotchas_discovered.workaround: Silent failures may mask issues; consider adding error tracking/logging infrastructure

gotchas_discovered.description: onLoad checks if AuthModuleService is already registered before registering
gotchas_discovered.consideration: Assumes DI container's isRegistered method is reliable; could fail silently if registration check is unreliable

gotchas_discovered.description: Event listeners set up in onEnable, not onLoad, may miss events during initialization
gotchas_discovered.consideration: Events emitted between onLoad and onEnable will not be captured

gotchas_discovered.description: buildFullPath function concatenates strings without normalizing slashes
gotchas_discovered.consideration: May produce double slashes if prefix or endpoint contains trailing/leading slashes

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created the core authentication module definition with comprehensive route configuration
deliverables: Auth module class with proper ModuleInstance implementation
Complete lifecycle hook system for module management
Path builder utilities for consistent route generation
Event listener integration for reactive module behavior
DI container integration for dependency injection

recommendations.recommendation: Implement structured logging with severity levels instead of console.log
recommendations.rationale: Current logging uses simple console.log which may not be captured in production environments

recommendations.recommendation: Add validation in buildFullPath to normalize slashes and prevent malformed URLs
recommendations.rationale: String concatenation without normalization could produce invalid paths like '/api/v1/auth//login'

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive unit tests for module lifecycle, hooks, and route builders
recommendations.rationale: Complex module with many integration points requires test coverage

recommendations.recommendation: Move event listener setup to onLoad instead of onEnable
recommendations.rationale: Ensures no events are missed between module load and enable phases

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding hook middleware chain support for sequential hook execution
recommendations.rationale: Current hook system executes single handlers; middleware pattern would support multiple handlers

recommendations.recommendation: Add documentation about default module settings and their implications
recommendations.rationale: Settings like sessionMaxCount=5 and lockoutDuration=1800 should be explained
